## TRM1.2. Additional time in taxi-in phase (PI#5) {#trm1.2.-additional-time-in-taxi-in-phase-pi5 .Heading-2-TZ}

Amsterdam Schiphol is the only Dutch airport subject to the monitoring of this indicator.

The additional time in 2025 was equal to 1.87 min/arr.

The average for RP4 airports subject to monitoring of this indicator across Member States in 2025 was 1.79 min/arr.
